subject: Set VNFSDK refrepo version to 1.5.1
commit_message:
Set VNFSDK refrepo version to 1.5.1

Issue-ID: VNFSDK-565

Signed-off-by: Kanagaraj Manickam <kanagaraj.manickam@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I11642da8c613bec8e0b679489205504f8e0b46e8

entries.message:
